programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: A new mayor forces Torrio and Capone outside Chicago to nearby Cicero. There, Capone's brother Frank fixes an election, placing himself in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: A betrayal destroys peace in Chicago, and Torrio and Capone seek revenge against the Irish gangs. The "Beer Wars" make Capone Chicago's top gangster.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Capone uses the St. Valentine's Day Massacre to assert his power over his enemies. President Hoover takes notice, and Eliot Ness takes on Capone.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Al Capone outwits Eliot Ness, but Capone's criminal empire remains in jeopardy when the IRS plants an undercover agent in his gang.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: With Capone in jail, Frank Nitti, Paul Ricca, and Joe Accardo take over. A Hollywood scandal presents Sam Giancana with a chance to prove himself.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Joe Accardo sets his sights on Las Vegas, but when Sam Giancana incurs the wrath of young attorney Robert F. Kennedy, The Outfit is threatened.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Joe Accardo and Sam Giancana have a falling out, and the fate of the Outfit rests on the outcome. Joe Accardo cleans up loose ends before retiring.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Visit the creative team behind Breaking Bad. Join Emmy-winner Bryan Cranston, Vince Gilligan and the entire writing team as they divulge how they created the stories for a show that was recently named one of the best written TV series of all time.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Pay a visit to the team behind Parks & Recreation, the show that skewers small-town politics and features one of America's most energetic, comic talents. Amy Poehler and the writers delve into what it's like to be funny for a living.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes of Dexter, the show about a serial killer with a strict moral code. Now in its 8th and final season, get rare insights from actor Michael C. Hall and show runner, Scott Buck, and the team who brought Dexter Morgan to life.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Go inside New Girl, the cult comedy about an adorkable girl and her three male roommates trying to make their way in the big city. Creator Liz Meriwether, actor Jake Johnson and the writing team share juicy details of their off-beat writer's room.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Join the co-creators of Game of Thrones, the hit HBO series, as they open up in a rare and candid behind-the-scenes look. In a revealing conversation, find out how Game of Thrones became the most epic television series of all time.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Go behind the curtain of one of the scariest and most unique TV series, American Horror Story, with creators Ryan Murphy & Brad Falchuck. See these creative minds spill the secrets of their success behind "one of the greatest TV dramas ever created."

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Host Jim Rash takes viewers behind the scandals of Scandal with creator and showrunner Shonda Rhimes, star Kerry Washington and writers Mark Wilding, Matt Byrne, Jenna Bans and Heather Mitchell as they dish about one of tv's most provocative shows.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Host Jim Rash explores the world of comic book adaptations for TV with "The Walking Dead" Creator Robert Kirkman and "Smallville" Creators Al Gough and Miles Millar. Pop culture expert Blair Butler and TV Guide's Michael Schneider join the chat.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Go inside the show that exposes our nation's (fictitious) dirty underbelly. "House of Cards" Showrunner Beau Willimon, star Molly Parker, writer Laura Eason and Co-Executive Producer John Mankiewicz reveal the creative process behind the hit series.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Host Jim Rash gets a behind-the-scenes look at the groundbreaking television series "Sons of Anarchy". Creator Kurt Sutter, star Katey Sagal and Executive Producers Charles Murray and Mike Daniels reveal the inner workings behind FX's biggest hit.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Jim Rash joins Creators Robert and Michelle King, star Julianna Margulies and Executive Producer Ted Humphrey to discuss "The Good Wife." From the hottest sex scenes to celebrity guests, get an exclusive glimpse into the creative process.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Showrunners I. Marlene King, Oliver Goldstick and Joseph Dougherty along with stars Shay Mitchell and Sasha Pieterse spill the dirt (including some spoilers) on the "Pretty Little Liars" creative process with never-before-told secrets from the set.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: An accident at sea cripples a Royal Navy expedition 200 miles from finding the Northwest Passage, forcing its captains to make a dire choice.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the field is covered in pokey pods before a rainbow ball tournament, Rainbow Ruby creates a golf game to whack the pods out of the field. // When things go missing in Rainbow Village, it's up to Detective Rainbow Ruby and Choco to find the culprit.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a Pilot to help Chirpee see what it's like to fly, like other birds. // Rainbow Ruby becomes a Fashion Designer and finds the perfect solution to Paige's fashion catastrophe.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: To help Ellie overcome her stage fright, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Dance Teacher to help her friend take part in a dance-a-thon. // When the new fairy won't stop playing a game of hide-and-seek, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Baker to draw her out with the aroma.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the rainbow friends try to make a movie starring Princess Kiki, they discover they need Rainbow Ruby to pull everything together and make it happen. // Rainbow Ruby realizes trying to get 3 tots back to sleep can be both frustrating and fun.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki falls under a sleeping enchantment and needs a moving music box to cure her. // There's an epic traffic jam in Rainbow Village until Police Officer Rainbow Ruby arrives to help.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The Rainbow Village Annual Noodle Festival is in trouble. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Chef and makes noodles to save the day. // Ruby goes to Rainbow Village to help Gina get her confidence back by making her a star in the circus.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the rainbow fountain stops working, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Plumber and fixes the fountain so that everyone can cool off. // Getting ready for her royal party, Kiki turns purple when she accidentally picks Plumenberries instead of Rainbow Berries.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When young Jessy is afraid of going to the hair salon, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Hairdresser to show Jessy just how fun a visit to the salon can be. // Rainbow Ruby becomes a Dentist to help Jessy with a painful new tooth.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a babysitter to help babysit Jessy who, because of eating a magic bean, has grown into a giant baby! // Rainbow Ruby becomes a choreographer to help Thunderbell apologize to his friend, Mr. Sloth, in a truly musical way.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Kiki's crown loses a jewel, Rainbow Ruby becomes an Archaeologist and follows a map to an ancient treasure. // It's New Year's in Rainbow Village and everyone has gathered for the special dumpling feast.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki's is upset when her garden is a mess. Ruby becomes a gardener and makes the garden lovely. // Mysterious gifts are being left for people across Rainbow Village. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Detective to work out who or what is leaving the gifts.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the Rainbow Village train won't stop running on the track, Rainbow Ruby becomes a firefighter to bring the train to a stop. // Rainbow Ruby becomes a fashion designer and makes fantastically fruity outfits to save the day.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a lifeguard to help Ling Ling learn how to swim! //Thunderbell cannot find his beloved pet fish, so Rainbow Ruby becomes a detective to help solve the mystery and learns that the fish was actually a tadpole who is turning into a frog.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a party planner and holds a party that satisfies both Prince Frederick and Princess Kiki. // When the poppies make a mess in Rainbow Village's town square, Rainbow Ruby becomes a clean-up engineer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Something is wrong with Kiki's beloved pomeranian on the day of the Rainbow Village Flower Festival, and Rainbow Ruby becomes a veterinarian to save the pup! // Rainbow Ruby becomes a marine biologist to help an injured baby dolphin return home.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Chirpee's bird friends come for a visit and want to perch on people's heads. // Prince Frederick comes to observe rainbow fish in the lake, only to discover that the water is frozen, and the fish are gone for the season.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The moon is gone, and the villagers can't sleep without his friendly “goodnight, sweet dreams!” // When Thunderbell adds too much bubble bath to his tub, he is trapped in a giant soap bubble.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby becomes an architect to help redesign Felicia's house after it accidentally gets destroyed by Gina. // Gina brings a machine to make rainbow sorbet for everyone.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Thunderbell discovers an unknown, delicious fruit, he eats up all of it at once. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When three little stars run away to Rainbow Village, Rainbow Ruby becomes an astronaut to return them safely to space. // When Kiki breaks a gem given to her by Prince Frederick, she doesn't get a chance to see its special sparkle.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: During a camping trip in the forest, the Rainbow Village friends see a “monster” and almost cancel the trip. // When Princess Kiki chips her leg before a ballet performance, Rainbow Ruby must take the stage to save the day!

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell's scooter breaks, and he must deliver packages on foot, which is slow and painful. // When Ling Ling's group portrait gift is ruined, Rainbow Ruby secretly takes photos and surprises him with a photo album of all of their friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the restaurant is overrun with customers who aren't being served properly, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Waitress. // When Ruby's spilled marbles pour down on Rainbow Village, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Paramedic to treat the wounded.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Jessy's upset because everyone forgot the anniversary of the day she arrived in Rainbow Village. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Chef to cheer her up. // When Ling Ling's cold won't go away, Doctor Ruby discovers his problem is really allergies.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When nobody can understand what roles actors are playing in a performance, Rainbow Ruby designs costumes for the cast! // When Paige gets swept up on a windy day, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Firefighter to bring her to safety.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a Singer and puts on a concert that cheers everyone up! // When Thunderbell forgets to mail invitations to his secret-swap-present party, Rainbow Ruby devises a plan to deliver them just in time.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the field is covered in pokey pods before a rainbow ball tournament, Rainbow Ruby creates a golf game to whack the pods out of the field. // When things go missing in Rainbow Village, it's up to Detective Rainbow Ruby and Choco to find the culprit.

programme.desc: After a warlock from the future comes to the present to destroy the people who will eventually create a vaccine against warlocks, Prue casts a 24-hour truth spell in order to determine if Andy finds out she’s a witch, will he still be attracted to her.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Rex (Neil Roberts) gets Prue (Shannen Doherty) a locket that harbors the evil warlock Matthew (guest star Matthew Tate), Matthew takes Prue’s powers and sets out for the other sisters.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Rex (guest star Neil Roberts) and Hannah (guest star Leigh- Allyn Baker) set out to destroy the sisters Halliwell and frame Prue (Shannen Doherty) for murder while angering her by Rex dating Phoebe (Alyssa Milano).

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When a teenage psychiatric patient, Natalie, escapes, her rebellious ghost twin asks Melinda for help, claiming Natalie doesn't belong in the clinic. Their parents placed her there for believing she can still feel Zoë's presence.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Melinda agrees to help a deceased fiancé communicate with his grieving fiancé and find the man who received his heart donation, in an effort to bring closure so they can both move on.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When Melinda and Andrea are hired to auction off furniture from an inn that was recently sold, Melinda encounters the mischievous ghosts of three young boys who refuse to leave the inn.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang takes Katara and Sokka to an Earthbender city. The kids cause damage and are brought before a crazy old king, who seems to enjoy messing with the kids' heads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives - but they are so reliant that they are blind to the immanent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Meanwhile, Zhao plans an attack and Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao’s Fire Navy fleet. In the heat of battle, Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn’t a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Zhao’s invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe’s defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help – but will he return in time to stop Zhao and prevent the destruction of the Water Tribe?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful “Avatar State” as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: On their way to Omashu, the kids become lost in the treacherous "Cave of Two Lovers."

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang enters Omashu so he can learn Earthbending from King Bumi, but the city is in the hands of the Fire Nation!

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When the kids end up in a mysterious and strange swamp, their fears are exposed. And Aang learns about being "connected to the Earth" from an unlikely teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang must clear up a wave of anti-Avatar sentiment and atone for something he did in the past.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang discovers a possible Earthbending mentor at an underground tournament.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Traveling without Uncle now, Zuko wanders alone into an Earth Kingdom town, where he bonds with a local boy. Meanwhile, Zuko is haunted by memories of his own youth.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: As the kids are pursued relentlessly by a mysterious machine, their exhaustion puts them at each other's throats.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Aang struggles with a block while trying to learn Earthbending from Toph, he wonders if the problem is with him or his teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A professor leads the kids to a spirit library in the middle of the desert, where Sokka hopes to discover powerful secrets to use against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang searches for Appa, while Katara struggles to keep everyone together so they can survive in the vast desert.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Someone mysteriously leaves a baby on Lieutenant Bubba Skinner's doorstep. When the Sparta police search for the mother, they uncover a car submerged in a lake and the dead body of the baby's mother inside, but who and where is the baby's father?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A conservative minister is murdered while trying to close down a traveling bordello operating near his church, but a surprising side of the man is revealed when the Sparta police investigate his death and, later, his wife's. Diane Ladd guest stars.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: After an employee of the high school is a no-show for work, it is discovered her car was run off the road by the driver of a semi-truck, resulting in her death. Later, the prime suspect, her ex-husband, is also murdered. Who wanted them both dead?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: After her involvement in a crime committed in Philadelphia, Regina, an old friend of Althea's runs to Sparta. She stays with Althea and sparks fly with Officer Sweet, but her past catches up when a dead body is found, and it's connected to her.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Tibbs is convinced that the right man is in custody for the recent murder in the Bottoms of a cab driver. The initial evidence points to his suspect, but Gillespie has his doubts and asks Tibbs to consider that race may be a factor in his choice.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Sparta Councilperson Harriet DeLong’s sister, Natalie, is found murdered, and Chief Gillespie has a suspect in mind, but it happens to be the most powerful man in town, so he’s keeping it quiet as he builds a case, much to the frustration of Tibbs.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A man contacts Alex about a problem but is killed before giving details. His last words are to save the horses. The rangers investigate the man's last days and find a plot to kill the wild mustangs on a range to make way for a development.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: After a woman's car is forced off the road by a hit-and-run, Walker makes a daring rescue of her and her daughter. He is injured and falls into a coma in the hospital. Trivette and others search for the driver of the hit-and-run car.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: An elderly Indian Chief dies. He learns that Chief Six Feathers was killed because he would not sign over his land for development. The chief's relative gets into trouble investigating the death. Walker and Trivette help.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker, Trivette, and CD take a vacation together. While there to fish, some men think they are there to find his drug operation. This places the rangers in danger as they are hunted down.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.desc: Sean proposes, but Jade's not sure how to respond. Leah is forced into quarantine when Jeremy tests positive for covid. Ashley plans a surprise party for Bar. Briana introduces her man to the cameras. Kail helps Isaac find an interest that he likes.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kail invites Devoin on her podcast. Jade decides to get plastic surgery in Miami, so Briana visits to coach her through her anxiety. Bar goes to court for his outstanding DUI charges. Leah's twins turn 11.

programme.desc: Jade's recovery gets even rockier when tensions rise between Sean and her parents. Ashley and Bar make a tough wedding decision as he faces another court date. Leah plans a birthday party for Addie, hoping Jeremy can make it.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Memo le daña los frenos al carro de Armando para acabar con él, pero quien se accidenta es otro. A Gabriela le molestan las visitas de Dínora, pero al menos descubre dónde está Ruth.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Raquel habla con Ruth, le ruega que regrese a casa y ella se niega, Juan le pide que respete esa decisión. Memo planea otro accidente para matar a Armando, esta vez espera no fallar.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín despierta furioso al darse cuenta de que le arruinaron su mejor fiesta, Norma le reclama a Gabriela su complicidad con Dínora y corre a buscar a Juan, su madre acepta que se casen.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan le encarga el vestido de novia de Norma a Leandro, quien se preocupa por su prima Ruth ante las injusticias de Raquel, mientras Óscar y Jimena negocian para salvar su matrimonio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando sigue a Sara y escondido, la ve con Franco, por lo que la insulta y le inventa mentiras, ella le da una bofetada y él busca a la aliada perfecta. Ruth defiende a los Reyes y a Leandro.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela interroga con insistencia a Fernando sobre el novio de Sara, Rosario le ruega a Franco que vuelva con ella, él le dice a quién ama; Armando da una orden, muy molesto con su esposa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara se percata de los dos hombres que acechan a Franco y responde con rapidez, Ruth, sin saber a dónde ir, huye de casa de Raquel. Dínora busca a Gabriela con otro ardid contra Juan y Norma.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One dangerous misstep leaves a Racer dangling 600 feet high in the Singapore sky, while a traditional Asian detox leaves several Teams writhing in pain.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race to Manila, Philippines where they get muddy with an ornery Ox during a memorable switchback challenge from season five.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: On the penultimate leg of the Race, two strong teams make a potentially one-million-dollar mistake. Also, Phil Keoghan greets the teams with shocking news at the Pit Stop.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time ever, four teams battle it out in the final leg for the million-dollar prize, but one team will face a shocking elimination before making it to the finish line, on the season finale.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time, THE AMAZING RACE features 11 new teams of all dating duos: six who are preexisting couples, and five duos who meet for the first time at the starting line.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Nagano, Japan where Racers take on an Olympic-sized Detour, and one team takes a tumble that may jeopardize their chances in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Tensions rise in Thailand as one team forgets their fanny pack, putting them behind, and one Racer celebrates the end of the leg when they pop a very special question.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams face a race within the Race when they attempt to navigate the chaotic streets of Bangkok, and Racers eat a traditional delicacy - a "1,000 year old egg."

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers strap on lederhosen for a trip to Oktoberfest in Bavaria, Germany, and one team finds their race in jeopardy after losing their fanny pack.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time, the Race travels to Monaco, where one team takes a big risk to gain an edge on the competition.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: When the race continues in Namibia, a flat tire deflates one team's hopes of leading the pack and the dreaded Double U-Turn returns.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The competition heats up as the final five teams race to Amsterdam and take a dip in a floating hot tub in search of their next clue.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams travel to Peru, where the Race gets physical and teams use their fitness trackers to help find their next clue. Also, Blair and Hayley's communication issues reach a boiling point.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney divides Mayberry into two hostile camps when he finds that an old assault case was never resolved.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie becomes a newspaper publisher and proceeds to put out a scandal sheet and distributes free samples.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee invents a beau. When she's pressed for a name she names the butter and egg man who is married.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Two fast girls from Mt. Pilot get a speeding ticket and enjoy the attention they get from the law officers.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Comedian Don Rickles guest stars as Newton Monroe, an itinerant peddler who seems unable to do anything right.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Deputy Barney Fife helps Opie with his schoolwork, using a teaching method all his own.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie tries to win a birthday present for his father at a carnival, not realizing that the carnival shooting gallery is crooked.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Jerry Van Dyke, brother of Dick Van Dyke guest stars as a carnival's destitute banjo player. He also proves to be an inept lawman when he is hired in Barney's Fife's absence.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy's son, Opie, demands that their new housekeeper, Andy's aunt, be fired after the old one leaves to get married.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy gives the state troopers a lesson in the efficiency of a county sheriff when a dangerous criminal escapes.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A hometown guitar player auditions with a dance band in the Mayberry jail.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ellie Walker, a pretty young graduate pharmacist, moves to Mayberry to help her uncle out in the local drugstore.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy thinks Ellie is out to marry him. After a series of misunderstandings, Andy finally takes Ellie to the church picnic.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy gives his son, Opie, a lecture on keeping promises, but must break one of his own in order to persuade a runaway kid to come home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Ellie stage a hold-up at the drugstore so that Barney can impress Miss Rosemary with his heroics.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy makes a judgment concerning his son, Opie, before hearing the boy's side of the story.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy tries to stop a long-time feud between 2 mountain families so their children can get married.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ellie Walker sets the men and women of Mayberry against each other when she runs for a seat on the town council.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney give a Christmas party in the jail for a prisoner and his family, and thereby convert the town scrooge.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A stranger comes to Mayberry and disrupts the life of the townspeople because he knows everyone's name and business.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A Hollywood producer descends on Mayberry and the town proceeds to make itself over in Hollywood's image.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a “black box.”

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: “To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth”.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They say that a burden shared is a burden halved, but when partners team up to commit murder, the weight of their guilt remains just as heavy. Investigators must rely on forensic science to capture partners in crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poisoners are the most devious of killers, relying on stealth or their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. They're the most dangerous creatures in the world: smart assassins. And they usually don't stop at one kill.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A friendly Midwest lodge becomes the scene of a gruesome double murder. Two men are dead and a safe filled with cash is missing.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Argentine family moves to North Fork. The townspeople are unfriendly to them, making fun of their clothing and customs. The Argentinean adult immigrant is openly hostile in return.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After the end of the Civil War, General Phil Sheridan, who has been appointed Governor of the New Mexico Territory, is on an inspection tour of the country.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas McCain's, a traveling photographer, comes to North Fork plying his trade. When a murder is committed, the photographer is accused of the crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sid Fallon tries to blackmail former gambler Julia Andueza into allowing him to use her boarding house as a gambling hall and saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas welcomes his old friend Tom Birch, who once saved his life, unaware that the man is now a bank robber on the run with his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury, released from Yuma prison, arrives in North Fork intent on getting even with Marshal Torrance, who helped send him to jail.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark McCain is eager to help lawman Jay Jefferson, who has arrived in North Fork intent on killing an outlaw for the reward, whether he is the right man or not.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Cleveland Williams
programme.desc: On November 14th, 1966 Muhammad Ali faced Cleveland Williams at the Astrodome in Houston, TX. They fought for WBC World Heavyweight titles in what was supposed to be a 15 round bout only went 3 resulting in a win for Ali.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Ernie Terrell
programme.desc: On February 6th, 1967 Muhammad Ali fought Ernie Terrel at the Astrodome in Hourston, Tx. They fought for WBA and WBC World Heavyweight titles in a bout that went 15 rounds ending in a unanimous decision victory for Ali.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Floyd Patterson 2
programme.desc: On September 20th, 1972 Muhammad Ali faced Floyd Patterson for a second time at Madison Square Garden in New York that ended in the seventh round due to swelling and cuts on Pattersons eye giving the victory to Ali.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Joe Frazier 3
programme.desc: On October 1st, 1975, Muhammad Ali and Joe Frazier fought for the third time for the World Heavyweight Title. Known as the "Thrilla in Manila," Ali ultimately emerged as the victor in what is considered one of the greatest boxing matches of all time.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Mac Foster
programme.desc: On April 1st, 1972 Muhammad Ali and Mac Foster fought in a fifteen round bout that ended in a unanimous decision win for Ali.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Oscar Natalio Bonavena
programme.desc: On December 7th, 1970 Muhammad Ali faced Oscar Natalio Bonavena in a 15 round bout with Bonavena going down three times in the last round forcing an automatic stoggage giving the win to Ali.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs. Joe Frazier 2
programme.desc: On January 28th, 1974 Muhammad Ali and Joe Frazier face eachother for a second time at Madison Square Garden in New York for North American Boxing Federation Heavyweight titles resulting in a strong win for Ali.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs. Ken Norton 2
programme.desc: On September 10th, 1973 Muhammad Ali and Ken Norton participated in their second meeting at the Forum in Inglewood, CA. They fought for the North American Boxing Federation Heavyweight title with Ali winning this time with split decision.

programme.title: Naoya Inoue vs Jason Moloney
programme.desc: On October 31st, 2020 Naoya Inoue faced Jason Moloney in The Bubble at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the IBF and WBA World Super Bantamweight titles ending in a knockout in the 7th round by Inoue.

programme.title: Naoya Inoue vs Nonito Donaire II
programme.desc: On June 7th, 2022 Naoya Inoue battled Nonoito Donaire for a second time at the Super Arena in Saitama for IBF, WBA and WBC World Bantamweight title with Inoue ending the bout in the second round defeating Donaire.

programme.title: Nonito Donaire vs Jorge Arce
programme.desc: On December 15th, 2012 Nonito Donaire faced Jorge Arce at the Toyota Center in Houston, Tx. With the bout ending in the third round with a win by Donaire, Arce announced his retirement in the ring after the bout.

programme.title: Orlando Salido vs Juan Manuel Lopez 2
programme.desc: On March 10th, 2012, Orlando Salido fought Juan Manuel Lopez for the WBO World Featherweight Title in San Juan, Puerto Rico. In a very entertaining fight with both fighters scoring knockdowns, Salido stopped Lopez in the 10th round.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Curtis Strong
programme.desc: On February 6th, 1993 Oscar De La Hoya and Curtis Strong fought at the Sports Arena in San Diego, Ca. in a 6 round bout that lasted 4 rounds ending in a technical knockout victory for De La Hoya.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Felix Sturm
programme.desc: On June 5th, 2004 Oscar De La Hoya fought Felix Sturm at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBO Middleweight title in a 12 round bout resulting in an unanimous decision win for De La Hoya.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Fernado Vargas
programme.desc: On September 14th, 2002, Oscar De La Hoya and Fernando Vargas fought for Super Welterweight titles at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. In an incredible battle, De La Hoya was able to stop Vargas in the 11th round.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Giorgio Campanella
programme.desc: On May 27th, 1994 Oscar De La hoya fought Giorgio Campanella at the MGM Grand Garden Arena in Las Vegas for the WBO World Super Featherweight title with De La Hoya knocking out Campanella in the thrid round securing his victory.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Sadie spends the day at Duck Commander for a school project, the guys try to show her the ins-and-outs of how a successful company works. But when Willie questions Jase's ingenuity in creating new products they get into a debate.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertson family pulls together a family reunion to give Mia a big send-off before her surgery.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When the Governor of Louisiana announces that he will be coming to Duck Commander to present Willie with a commerce award, John Luke volunteers to give the introduction speech.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: With Reed's graduation day approaching, Jase decides to take Reed frog hunting the night before, like he did on the day of his own graduation. Willie and Si join in, and Jase tries to keep them from imparting their "college advice" on Reed.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie agrees to sponsor Mountain Man's radio contest, a "Hands on a Hardbody" competition, he somehow finds himself competing against Si for Mountain Man's last minute prize: a woodchipper.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When the Robertsons participate in the West Monroe Fire Department pancake breakfast, the firemen invite Willie and his brothers to train with the department for the day. Meanwhile, Phil and Si accompany Miss Kay on a trip to visit a family grave.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie contemplates re-branding the Duck Commander image, Jase takes issue with having an outsider design their image, so he and the guys create their own new logo and business cards. Meanwhile, Willie and Phil help Bella with her science project.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The guys realize it is time for the annual cleaning of the duck blinds when they come across a gator using one as a home. Meanwhile, while the kids are running the church car wash, Si and Willie disagree on the best way to draw in customers.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Brotherly competition is taken to a whole new level when Jase and Willie challenge Alan and Jep to a survival race through the woods on Phil's property. Meanwhile, Si is interested in finding a new hobby when he sees Kay cutting coupons.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Phil discovers more beaver activity on the Robertson land, he recruits Jase, Jep, and Si to get rid of them. Meanwhile, Willie and Korie bring Bella to her first day of karate practice.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The Ice Road Truckers are back in action, and the roads are more dangerous than ever. Lisa's first run of the season goes south in a hurry. Two rookie drivers raise the stakes in the "Dash for the Cash."

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Hugh and Rick roll deeper into the Canadian outback, while a dangerous overflow may leave Alex stranded in the wilderness. Dave's training run with Tony reaches the boiling point. Lisa Kelly goes on a rescue mission.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Dave's hot temper may cost him his second, and final shot to become an Ice Road Trucker . Maya fights to prove she belongs behind the wheel.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Hugh and Rick are hauling the biggest load ever to travel up the Canadian ice roads! The record breaking journey spans three days and right out of the gate, Rick's amateur antics cause problems for the Convoy, which puts Hugh in the hot seat.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: While hauling loads north, the Ice Road Truckers hammer away at the weather, accident, and truck obstacles in their way. As Hugh and Rick deliver the largest load ever trucked on Manitoba's ice roads, their convoy comes to a sudden halt.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The Ice Road Truckers face their greatest challenges to date. Lisa takes on the biggest haul of her career, and a huge promotion may be on the line. Maya is still stuck under Phil's wing and she's beginning to wonder if he'll ever let her make a solo run.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. The Autobots and Decepticons begin to malfunction, losing their powers due to a lack of the compound Cybertronium on Earth. But the Dinobots are fully functional and in no need of Cybertronium, and the Dinobot Grimlocks has plans of his own!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Spike and Carlee are stranded on Cybertron, desperate to find the Cybertronium needed to heal the ailing Autobots on Earth. Their only hope is to free the Dinobots, who are on Cybertron under the control of Shockwave's brainwashing program.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When Starscream inadvertently activates a time machine, he and his fellow Decepticons are sent back to medieval times. Luckily Spike, Hoist, and Warpath follow them back, and with help from Merlin, they are prepared to defend the kingdom from them.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Crash-landing on the moon Titan, the Decepticons trick the population into believing they are “Sky Gods” and that the people should serve them. Desperate to free her people, a brave girl sends an S.O.S. to the Autobots…but will they arrive in time?

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To stop the Decepticons from drilling into Earth’s core, the Autobots hijack and reprogram the mighty Devastator to use against them. But when they lose control of the giant, the only hope for survival is for the Autobots and Decepticons to work together!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To stop the Decepticons from drilling into Earth's core, the Autobots hijack and reprogram the mighty Devastator to use against them. But when they lose control of the giant, the only hope for survival is for the Autobots and Decepticons to work together!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Autobot Tracks is damaged while trying to help authorities investigate a plague of car thefts in New York City. Once he is repaired by his human friend Raoul, the two uncover a Decepticon plan to turn the cars into an unstoppable Decepticon army!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race. While they are racing, Megatron is given the perfect opportunity to use his latest weapon - the Transfixation Ray, a device that locks the Autobots into car mode, unable to change back to robot form.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Insecticons have multiplied into an army of thousands. The huge swarms feed on everything in their path, even blocking out the sun! Desperate for a solution, Cosmos, Bumblebee, and Spike travel to a far-off planet in search of a robotic insecticide.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Insecticons have multiplied into an army of thousands. The huge swarms feed on everything in their path, even blocking out the sun! Desperate for a solution, Cosmos, Bumblebee, and Spike travel to a far-off planet in search of a robotic insecticide.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons are thrown through space to a strange world where they are no larger than an alien child's play toy. Suddenly the smallest household nuisances are the Autobots' biggest threats!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: En route back to Earth, the Autobots are captured and deactivated. Their only chance for survival is an alliance between Smokescreen and a shady alien space captain planning to win big on the Monicus Asteroid, site of the best casino in the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: En route back to Earth, the Autobots are captured and deactivated. Their only chance for survival is an alliance between Smokescreen and a shady alien space captain planning to win big on the Monicus Asteroid, site of the best casino in the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Thought to be extinct, four female Autobots come out of hiding to raid a Decepticon base on Cybertron for Energon Cubes. When their team leader Aleta-1 is captured, Megatron uses her to force Optimus Prime to surrender himself.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When the city's hottest nightclub, "Dancitron" opens up, its patrons mysteriously start aiding the Decepticons. After his break-dancing crew gets run off by the club's security, Raoul gets some backup from his trusted Autobot friends.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To aid in their latest scheme, The Decepticons kidnap a scientist. When Autobot Powerglide embarks on a high-altitude mission to save her, they form a bond that will keep his spirits flying high… even in the middle of a Decepticon fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To aid in their latest scheme, The Decepticons kidnap a scientist. When Autobot Powerglide embarks on a high-altitude mission to save her, they form a bond that will keep his spirits flying high... even in the middle of a Decepticon fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: It's Decepticon versus Decepticon when triple changers Astrotrain and Blitzwing decide to seize power. Using a molecule-freezing device to take Megatron and Starscream out of the picture, the two are free to lead how they see fit.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: An S.O.S. seeking help from the Autobots arrives from the desperate people of the planet Traal, who have been forced into slave labor by Deceptitron. Seaspray arrives with the Autobots rescue team, and discovers much more than he was planning on.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. Megatron creates a powerful strike team, but his Stunticons lack sentience and independent thought. This leads the Decepticons deep into the heart of Cybertron to steal Vector Sigma, the computer that brought life to those on the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Attempting to even the odds against the Stunticons, the Autobots create the Aerialbots to join in the battle against Megatron, who plans to use Vector Sigma to turn the Earth into a metal planet like Cybertron!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Robots are truly in disguise when the Autobots pose as Stunticons to uncover Megatron's latest plan involving the thefts of some high-profile materials.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race to watch over an experimental race car—a car made of a special type of material Megatron needs to complete his latest doomsday weapon, a weather-dominating device capable of mass destruction.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race to watch over an experimental race car - a car made of a special type of material Megatron needs to complete his latest doomsday weapon, a weather-dominating device capable of mass destruction.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Aerialbots are thrown back in time to Cybertron's Golden Age. While there, they learn the truth of Megatron's early treachery as well as witness firsthand the creation of Cybertron's greatest hero, Optimus Prime!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Megatron becomes infected with cosmic rust, a metal-consuming plague. When Autobot scientist Perceptor is forced to find a cure for Megatron, the entire Autobot civilization is again put at risk of extinction. But an Autobot invention may save them...

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: After a failed attempt on Megatron's life, Starscream is banished to a deserted island. There he finds the remains of World War II battle vehicles and decides to use them as the basis for his own attack team, the Combaticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: United as “Bruticus,” the Combaticons are virtually unstoppable. They plan to pull the Earth into the Sun to eliminate all of their enemies at once. The only hope is for the Autobots and Decepticons to join forces to take Bruticus down!

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie invites some ladies of the league to meet and plan an event, but as the new girls get to know each other, the claws come out, and when the focus turns to Draya, it all goes left. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Brittish is determined to give it another shot and throws a "Turkish Tea Party" for the group. Meanwhile, Brandi's time to have another baby is running out, so she and her husband Jason seek the help of a fertility specialist. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Things are getting serious with Draya and her boyfriend Orlando Scandrick, but Jackie's daughter has news that may rock Draya's world. Meanwhile, Brittish's fiancé Lorenzo Gordon gets advice from Jackie's husband, Doug Christie. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Draya confronts her boyfriend about accusations of possible infidelity with Jackie's daughter, Chantel. Jackie's gala event falls apart when almost none of her friends show up and Brittish gets into an altercation with Malaysia. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: With the group still reeling from the effects of Jackie's event, Sundy decides the ladies need a getaway to Palm Springs—but for the good of the group, Brittish is not invited. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: The Palm Springs getaway is anything but relaxing as tensions between Draya and Sundy erupt into full-blown mayhem. And in a tearful confession, Draya tells Jackie her daughter may not be as innocent as she thinks. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie develops a bottle for the cognac brand she hopes to launch. As payback for Palm Springs, Draya hosts all the ladies at an excruciating Mud Run. And Jackie forces a meeting with Draya to clear her daughter's name. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey swats Perfectly Ultimate Great Moth only to have Weevil let loose the ferocious Insect Queen, the crown jewel of insects that grows in strength for every creepy crawler it cannibalizes. Will Weevil's royal ravager swarm Joey into submission?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi faces off against another of Marik's nefarious Rare Hunters, the silent but deadly Strings.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Strings summons one of the most powerful creatures in the history of Duel Monsters: the Egyptian God Monster Slifer the Sky Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The magic card Infinite Cards allows Strings to hold an unlimited number of cards in his hand.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey squares off against the sea duelist Mako Tsunami and his bevy of underwater beasts. If Joey wins, he'll have all six Locator Cards necessary to enter the Battle City Finals, but if he loses, he can kiss the finals goodbye.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mako's oceanic warrior, The Legendary Fisherman, unleashes a wave of destruction by stealthily destroying Joey's monsters from the depths of the sea. Joey has to put his skills, training, and experience to the ultimate test before he's all washed out.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik, with the help of Bakura, kidnaps Joey and Tea. The Rare Hunters also kidnap Mokuba to force Yugi and Kaiba to take on tag team duelists Umbra and Lumis on top of a skyscraper. The losers will be sent plummeting into the Shadow Realm.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Lumis and Umbra systematically dismantle Yugi and Kaiba's tumultuous teamwork. Can Yugi and Kaiba learn to put their differences aside before they're sent on a one-way trip into the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba start to exhibit signs of teamwork, but it's too little too late when Umbra and Lumis summon Masked Beast Des Gardius.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi combines his magnetic monsters into the polar powerhouse Valkyrion the Magna Warrior!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba are on a rescue mission to save their friends. But along the way, all their worries and secrets are revealed as they relive the troubles they've faced and will face in the future.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's friend versus friend as Marik mind controls Joey to duel against Yugi. The loser will be dragged into the ocean to sleep with the fishes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Though Joey decimates Yugi's life points, Yugi can't bring himself to attack his dear friend. Yugi summons Joey's favorite monster Red-Eyes Black Dragon to bring Joey back to his senses.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi starts to break Marik's spell over Joey, but he now must duel without the Millennium Puzzle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: There's only one minute left in the duel before the loser is sent plummeting to the depths of the sea. Will these best friends actually send each other to their doom?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the battle of the ghouls as Bakura unleashes his army of ghosts against Bonz's zealous zombies for the right to enter the Battle City finals. But for whom will the final bell toll when this duel is played in the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the game of love as Hollywood heartthrob Jean-Claude Magnum challenges Mai to a duel in order to win her hand in marriage.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Let the Battle City finals begin! The eight finalists have their skill and endurance put to the ultimate test in a dueling arena thousands of feet in the sky.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the first duel of the Battle City finals as Yugi squares off against the evil spirit of the Millennium Ring who possessed Bakura. Yugi quickly disposes of Bakura's grotesque ghouls, but Bakura has a sinister strategy straight from the graveyard.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura activates Destiny Board, which will cause Yugi to lose automatically in five turns. If that's not bad enough, Bakura's Dark Sanctuary damages Yugi's Life Points every time Yugi attacks. Unable to attack and running out of time, Yugi's trapped.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's Slifer the Sky Dragon is about to unleash the final blow to win the duel, but Bakura may not survive the blast from the almighty Egyptian God Monster. Will Yugi attack and advance in the finals or will he surrender to save Bakura's life?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origin of the Egyptian God Cards is finally revealed. The mysterious Shadi takes Yugi on a journey back in time to the creation of Duel Monsters… and the dangerous powers it released.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In the second duel of the Battle City finals, Odion, disguised as Marik, befuddles Joey with numerous traps to bring the duel to a stalemate. However, Joey has Giant Trunade, the perfect counter to Odion's strategy.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Odion's Embodiments of Apophis run roughshod over Joey's monsters and his Life Points. Can Joey effectively utilize the monsters he won earlier in the tournament, or is he too flustered to mount a successful counterattack?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a feeding frenzy as Odion's Mystical Beast Selket devours Joey's monsters to morph into greater and powerful stages of evolution! How can Joey defeat Selket when it ingests Joey's monsters whenever they're summoned on to the field?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Odion uses a phony Egyptian God Card to summon the third Egyptian God Monster, The Winged Dragon of Ra, targeted to annihilate the rest of Joey's Life Points.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The third duel of the Battle City finals between Mai and Marik is no ordinary duel; it's a battle in the dreaded Shadow Realm where losing Life Points equals losing your memories.

programme.title: Victorious: Pilot
programme.desc: After Tori fills in for her ailing sister in a big musical showcase, Tori is asked to enroll at an elite performing arts high school. But once there, Tori struggles to fit in to her new surroundings.

programme.title: Victorious: The Bird Scene
programme.desc: Tori goes all out to master an iconic Hollywood Arts monologue in Sikowitz's class. Meanwhile, André and Robbie join a ballet class to meet girls, with disastrous results.

programme.title: Victorious: Stage Fighting
programme.desc: Tori has to defend herself after Jade claims Tori hurt her in a stage fighting exercise. Meanwhile, Trina has to fend off Robbie's advances when he thinks their stage kiss meant something.

programme.title: Victorious: Beck's Big Break
programme.desc: Tori accidentally gets Beck fired from a small role in a movie, then must figure out a way to get him his job back. Meanwhile, Robbie suffers frightening nightmares about his best friend Rex.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori the Zombie
programme.desc: Tori gets the lead in a high profile school musical, but freaks out when a stage makeup project goes awry, and she's left looking like a zombie on opening night.

programme.title: Victorious: Jade Dumps Beck
programme.desc: After a jealous Jade dumps Beck, she soon regrets it and recruits Tori to help get him back. Meanwhile, Trina puts on a one-woman show and tells Robbie he better give it a good review… or else!

programme.title: Victorious: The Birthweek Song
programme.desc: Tori struggles to find the perfect birthday gift for Trina, then decides to write her sister a song as a present. An ungrateful Trina turns the song into cash by selling it, enraging Tori.

programme.title: Victorious: Robarazzi
programme.desc: Tori suggests Robbie capture videos of students' everyday lives to increase his blog traffic, but when the camera is turned on Tori, she asks him to stop. Only Robbie doesn't and Tori realizes she's created a monster.

programme.title: Victorious: A Film by Dale Squires
programme.desc: When a hot young filmmaker comes to Hollywood Arts, the kids are excited to work on his project. But when the film is released, and they aren't given credit, the kids turn to revenge.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly tells Sam and Freddie to try each other's favorite hobbies. Meanwhile, Spencer bumps into his old babysitter and asks her to dinner. After reverting to their old roles, will they stay together?

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly tries to impress a new boyfriend by trying to look smarter than she is. Meanwhile, the gang tries to find T-Bo a new place to live after he gets kicked out of the Groovy Smoothie.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: A high-level government agency starts to inquire into the iCarly gang after they hack into a secure network to throw Carly's dad an online birthday party. *Guest Star - Michelle Obama

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly gets her toe stuck in a bathtub right before she is supposed to leave for a date. Meanwhile, Sam and the rest of the gang get trapped in Canada when she's caught trying to smuggle Fat Cakes over the border.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Freddie wants to be recognized for his creative contributions to iCarly, so he comes up with a technology that allows people to see 3D webcasts without glasses. Unfortunately, it temporarily alters people's vision.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Christopher Cane, the actor who plays Rex on Victorious, returns to host an in-depth interview with the stars of iCarly and to show their hilarious bloopers/outtakes.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: After finding out their old captor, Nora, is being released from jail, the iCarly kids try to halt her release, but decide to allow it. They then return to her house, but will they make it out again?

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly catches a contagious illness and accidentally gets a member of the band, One Direction, sick. Meanwhile, Spencer is stuck training a little girl who dislikes exercising.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: With Sam's help, Gibby opens a secret restaurant in the school's basement. Meanwhile, Spencer designs a security robot for the loft which goes unexpectedly haywire.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly and Spencer are being evicted from their apartment, and the gang reminisces about their time in Bushwell Plaza. Although, their memories may not be quite how we remember them.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Freddie's new dream job becomes a nightmare when Sam gets hired too! Meanwhile, Carly tries to get a clueless guy to ask her out, and Spencer has to volunteer at the local firehouse.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The iCarly gang celebrate 'Halfoween' because they think Halloween is so great that it should come twice a year! But when Nevel pulls a prank on Carly and her friends, the party spins out of control.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Spencer has a new nemesis - Chuck's more menacing younger brother, Chip! Meanwhile, Freddie fixes Gibby's toy phaser and gives it a power he never imagined!

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly bans T-Bo from the loft, he retaliates by not letting Carly into the Groovy Smoothie. Meanwhile, Freddie and Gibby discover being in a band has many perks and a few drawbacks.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam learns her mom is in a Vegas jail, the gang decides to gather their most prized possessions, drive to Vegas and pawn their stuff to make enough money to bail her out.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Sam's friend gets out of juvy and Sam warns everyone to stay away, but Carly doesn't listen and finds herself in over her head. Back at the loft, Spencer finds a pair of night vision goggles.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam's laptop gets stolen, the iCarly gang tries to help track down the thief.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly wants her dad to escort her to an important dance, but when he can't make it a very sick Spencer tries to help her out. Meanwhile, Sam fixes a motorcycle and Freddie gets a new phone.
